categories.name: Logos
categories.description: Official Wiedmann Bros Distributing logos in multiple color treatments and formats. SVG for scalable use in print and high-resolution web; PNG for quick drag-and-drop into documents and email signatures.

categories.name: Web Banners
categories.description: Pre-made banners for use on dealer websites, email signatures, and digital displays. SVG scales crisply to any size; PNG fallbacks at 2× resolution included for systems that don't accept SVG.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — Black (SVG)
assets.description: Solid black logo. Use on white or light-colored backgrounds. Vector format scales to any size — recommended for print, signage, and high-resolution web.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — Black (PNG)
assets.description: Solid black logo, raster format. Use for email signatures, slide decks, and quick drag-and-drop scenarios where SVG isn't supported.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — White (SVG)
assets.description: Solid white logo. Use on dark or photographic backgrounds. Vector format scales to any size — recommended for print, signage, and high-resolution web.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — White (PNG)
assets.description: Solid white logo, raster format. Use for email signatures, slide decks, and other contexts where SVG isn't supported. Transparent background.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — White + Green Accent (SVG)
assets.description: Two-tone logo treatment with white wordmark and lime green accent. The signature brand presentation — preferred treatment when on dark backgrounds where color is appropriate.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — White + Green Accent (PNG)
assets.description: Signature two-tone brand treatment in raster format. Use for email signatures, slide decks, social posts, and quick-share scenarios.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — Variable White Skew (SVG)
assets.description: Stylized white logo variant with skewed letterforms. Alternate display treatment — use selectively where a more dynamic mark is appropriate.

assets.title: WBDC Logo — Variable White Skew (PNG)
assets.description: Stylized white logo variant in raster format. Alternate display treatment — use selectively for dynamic placements.

assets.title: Authorized Dealer Banner — Horizontal (SVG)
assets.description: 600×200 horizontal banner for use in dealer-website footer rows, sidebars, or homepage strips. Communicates authorized dealer status, aftermarket accessory category, and equipment coverage (UTV, Tractor, Mower, Construction). SVG scales crisply to any size.

assets.title: Authorized Dealer Banner — Horizontal (PNG)
assets.description: Horizontal banner in raster format, 1200×400 source for retina-ready display at 600×200. Drop-in fallback for systems that don't accept SVG (some email signature builders, older CMS platforms).

assets.title: Authorized Dealer Banner — Vertical (SVG)
assets.description: 300×600 vertical banner for sidebar slots and rail placements on dealer websites. Communicates authorized dealer status with full hierarchy: AUTHORIZED DEALER, aftermarket accessory positioning, equipment categories, and SOLD HERE reinforcement. SVG scales crisply to any size.

assets.title: Authorized Dealer Banner — Vertical (PNG)
assets.description: Vertical banner in raster format, 600×1200 source for retina-ready display at 300×600. Drop-in fallback for systems that don't accept SVG.

title: WBDC Logo — White + Green Accent (SVG)
description: Two-tone logo treatment with white wordmark and lime green accent. The signature brand presentation — preferred treatment when on dark backgrounds where color is appropriate.

title: WBDC Logo — White + Green Accent (PNG)
description: Signature two-tone brand treatment in raster format. Use for email signatures, slide decks, social posts, and quick-share scenarios.

title: WBDC Logo — Variable White Skew (SVG)
description: Stylized white logo variant with skewed letterforms. Alternate display treatment — use selectively where a more dynamic mark is appropriate.

title: WBDC Logo — Variable White Skew (PNG)
description: Stylized white logo variant in raster format. Alternate display treatment — use selectively for dynamic placements.
